# diffgrab

> Web page change tracking with structured diffs — markgrab + snapgrab integration, MCP native.

## Purpose

diffgrab monitors web pages for content changes over time. It fetches page content via markgrab, stores snapshots in a local SQLite database, and produces structured diffs with line-level additions/removals and section-level change detection. Optional snapgrab integration provides visual screenshot diffs.

## Capabilities

- **URL tracking**: Register URLs with configurable check intervals for periodic monitoring
- **Change detection**: Compare current page content against stored snapshots
- **Structured diffs**: Unified diff output with added/removed line counts and changed section names
- **Snapshot history**: Browse and compare any two historical snapshots of a tracked URL
- **MCP server**: 5 change tracking tools exposed via FastMCP (stdio transport)

## Installation

```
pip install diffgrab          # core (markgrab + httpx)
pip install diffgrab[cli]     # CLI (click + rich)
pip install diffgrab[mcp]     # MCP server (fastmcp)
pip install diffgrab[visual]  # visual diffs (snapgrab)
pip install diffgrab[all]     # everything
```

## Quick Use

### CLI

```bash
diffgrab track https://example.com              # register URL for tracking
diffgrab check                                   # check all tracked URLs for changes
diffgrab diff https://example.com                # show structured diff
diffgrab history https://example.com             # show snapshot history
diffgrab untrack https://example.com             # stop tracking
```

### Python

```python
import asyncio
from diffgrab import track, check, diff

asyncio.run(track("https://example.com", interval_hours=12))
results = asyncio.run(check())  # list[DiffResult]
d = asyncio.run(diff("https://example.com"))  # DiffResult with .unified_diff, .changed_sections
```

### MCP

Server: `diffgrab-mcp` (stdio transport)
Tools: `track_url`, `check_changes`, `get_diff`, `get_history`, `untrack_url`

## Links

- Docs: https://github.com/QuartzUnit/diffgrab
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/diffgrab/
- Source: https://github.com/QuartzUnit/diffgrab
